title: INVERT Core v2 Replication Package
description: Source code, preregistered tasks, generated artifacts, frozen detector metadata, and analysis reports for the INVERT Process Trinity study (ACM TOSEM). Confirmatory results use local Ollama models; paid cloud APIs are optional.

related_identifiers.identifier: TODO: Zenodo DOI or journal DOI

notes: Manuscript LaTeX source lives outside this repository at ~/papers/invert/paper/. Frozen generalization run IDs: core_v2_generalization_local_eager_lazy_001, core_v2_generalization_local_bfs_dfs_001, core_v2_generalization_local_deterministic_randomized_001, core_v2_generalization_local_quadrature_001.
